title: SieveErrorKind::Parse used for comparator errors — wrong type
description: validate_stmt returns SieveErrorKind::Parse for 'unsupported comparator' errors. Parse is the wrong kind — this is a semantic validation failure, not a structural parse error. A caller checking kind == SieveErrorKind::Parse to detect malformed syntax will also catch comparator rejections, confusing the two. Fix: add SieveErrorKind::UnsupportedComparator(String) and use it in validate_stmt.
